query:
SELECT 
  away_team, home_team, game_date,
  away_book_spread, home_book_spread, book_total,
  away_spread_odds, home_spread_odds, over_odds, under_odds,
  away_ml, home_ml,
  open_away_spread, open_home_spread, open_total,
  open_over_odds, open_under_odds, open_away_ml, open_home_ml,
  away_tickets, home_tickets, away_spread_handle, home_spread_handle,
  away_total_tickets, home_total_tickets
FROM games
WHERE game_date = '2026-03-15' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
ORDER BY game_time ASC;
